```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const x1Min = -10, x1Max = 10;
  const x2Min = -10, x2Max = 10;

  const step2d = 0.25;
  const step3d = 0.25;

  const x1s2d = d3.range(x1Min, x1Max + step2d, step2d);
  const x2s2d = d3.range(x2Min, x2Max + step2d, step2d);

  const x1s3d = d3.range(x1Min, x1Max + step3d, step3d);
  const x2s3d = d3.range(x2Min, x2Max + step3d, step3d);

  const boxWidth = (x1Max - x1Min) * 0.5;
  const boxHeight = (x2Max - x2Min) * 0.25;

  const invalid = w1 === 0 && w2 === 0;

  let boundaryPlot = null;
  let boundary3dFloor = null;
  let boundary3dSurface = null;

  if (!invalid) {
    if (w1 === 0) {
      const yConst = -b_2d / w2;

      boundaryPlot = Plot.ruleY([yConst], {
        stroke: "black",
        strokeWidth: 3
      });

      boundary3dFloor = {
        type: "scatter3d",
        mode: "lines",
        x: [x1Min, x1Max],
        y: [yConst, yConst],
        z: [0, 0],
        line: { color: "black", width: 6 },
        showlegend: false,
        hoverinfo: "skip"
      };

      boundary3dSurface = {
        type: "scatter3d",
        mode: "lines",
        x: [x1Min, x1Max],
        y: [yConst, yConst],
        z: [0.5, 0.5],
        line: { color: "black", width: 4, dash: "dash" },
        showlegend: false,
        hoverinfo: "skip"
      };

    } else if (w2 === 0) {
      const xConst = -b_2d / w1;

      boundaryPlot = Plot.ruleX([xConst], {
        stroke: "black",
        strokeWidth: 3
      });

      boundary3dFloor = {
        type: "scatter3d",
        mode: "lines",
        x: [xConst, xConst],
        y: [x2Min, x2Max],
        z: [0, 0],
        line: { color: "black", width: 6 },
        showlegend: false,
        hoverinfo: "skip"
      };

      boundary3dSurface = {
        type: "scatter3d",
        mode: "lines",
        x: [xConst, xConst],
        y: [x2Min, x2Max],
        z: [0.5, 0.5],
        line: { color: "black", width: 4, dash: "dash" },
        showlegend: false,
        hoverinfo: "skip"
      };

    } else {
      const m = -w1 / w2;
      const ord = -b_2d / w2;

      const boundaryData2d = x1s2d.map(xi => ({ x1: xi, x2: m * xi + ord }));

      boundaryPlot = Plot.line(boundaryData2d, {
        x: "x1",
        y: "x2",
        stroke: "black",
        strokeWidth: 3
      });

      const boundaryData3d = x1s3d.map(xi => ({ x1: xi, x2: m * xi + ord }));
      const inside = boundaryData3d.filter(
        d => d.x1 >= x1Min && d.x1 <= x1Max && d.x2 >= x2Min && d.x2 <= x2Max
      );

      if (inside.length > 0) {
        boundary3dFloor = {
          type: "scatter3d",
          mode: "lines",
          x: inside.map(d => d.x1),
          y: inside.map(d => d.x2),
          z: inside.map(() => 0),
          line: { color: "black", width: 6 },
          showlegend: false,
          hoverinfo: "skip"
        };

        boundary3dSurface = {
          type: "scatter3d",
          mode: "lines",
          x: inside.map(d => d.x1),
          y: inside.map(d => d.x2),
          z: inside.map(() => 0.5),
          line: { color: "black", width: 4, dash: "dash" },
          showlegend: false,
          hoverinfo: "skip"
        };
      }
    }
  }

  if (plotMode === "2D") {
    const plot2d = Plot.plot({
      width: 420,
      height: 420,
      x: { label: "x1", domain: [x1Min, x1Max] },
      y: { label: "x2", domain: [x2Min, x2Max] },
      color: {
        domain: [0, 1],
        range: ["#9ecae1", "#bae4b3"]
      },
      marks: [
        Plot.raster({
          x1: x1Min,
          x2: x1Max,
          y1: x2Min,
          y2: x2Max,
          pixelSize: 4,
          fill: (x1, x2) => activation(w1 * x1 + w2 * x2 + b_2d)
        }),
        Plot.ruleX([0], { stroke: "black", strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
        Plot.ruleY([0], { stroke: "black", strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
        boundaryPlot,
        invalid && Plot.rect(
          [{
            x1: -boxWidth / 2,
            x2: boxWidth / 2,
            y1: -boxHeight / 2,
            y2: boxHeight / 2
          }],
          {
            x1: "x1",
            x2: "x2",
            y1: "y1",
            y2: "y2",
            fill: "white",
            fillOpacity: 0.9,
            stroke: "black",
            strokeWidth: 1
          }
        ),
        invalid && Plot.text(
          [{
            x1: 0,
            x2: 0,
            label: "No decision boundary :)\nThis is because w1 = w2 = 0\n\nTherefore, we choose based on b\nIf b >= 0, choose 1, otherwise 0."
          }],
          {
            x: "x1",
            y: "x2",
            text: "label",
            textAnchor: "middle",
            fontSize: 14,
            fill: "black"
          }
        )
      ].filter(Boolean)
    });

    const wrapper2d = document.createElement("div");
    wrapper2d.style.cssText = "display:flex; justify-content:center; width:100%;";
    wrapper2d.appendChild(plot2d);
    return wrapper2d;
  }

  // 3D mode
  const zSurface = x2s3d.map(x2 =>
    x1s3d.map(x1 => activation(w1 * x1 + w2 * x2 + b_2d))
  );

  const zPlane = x2s3d.map(() =>
    x1s3d.map(() => 0)
  );

  const plot3dDiv = document.createElement("div");
  plot3dDiv.style.width = "420px";
  plot3dDiv.style.height = "420px";

  const plotlyScriptId = "plotly-cdn-script";
  if (!document.getElementById(plotlyScriptId)) {
    const s = document.createElement("script");
    s.id = plotlyScriptId;
    s.src = "https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js";
    document.head.appendChild(s);
    await new Promise(resolve => { s.onload = resolve; });
  } else if (!window.Plotly) {
    await new Promise(resolve => {
      const wait = () => window.Plotly ? resolve() : setTimeout(wait, 30);
      wait();
    });
  }

  const planeTrace = {
    type: "surface",
    x: x1s3d,
    y: x2s3d,
    z: zPlane,
    surfacecolor: zSurface,
    colorscale: [
      [0, "#9ecae1"],
      [1, "#bae4b3"]
    ],
    cmin: 0,
    cmax: 1,
    opacity: 0.35,
    showscale: false,
    hoverinfo: "skip"
  };

  const surfaceTrace = {
    type: "surface",
    x: x1s3d,
    y: x2s3d,
    z: zSurface,
    colorscale: [
      [0, "#9ecae1"],
      [1, "#bae4b3"]
    ],
    cmin: 0,
    cmax: 1,
    opacity: 0.95,
    showscale: true,
    colorbar: {
      title: "σ(wx + b)",
      len: 0.62,
      y: 0.58,
      thickness: 12
    },
    hovertemplate: "x1=%{x:.2f}<br>x2=%{y:.2f}<br>σ=%{z:.3f}<extra></extra>"
  };

  const traces = [
    planeTrace,
    surfaceTrace,
    boundary3dFloor,
    boundary3dSurface
  ].filter(Boolean);

  await window.Plotly.newPlot(
    plot3dDiv,
    traces,
    {
      margin: { l: 0, r: 0, t: 0, b: 0 },
      title: { text: "" },
      scene: {
        domain: { x: [0, 1], y: [0.08, 1] },
        xaxis: {
          title: "x1",
          range: [x1Min, x1Max],
          showspikes: false
        },
        yaxis: {
          title: "x2",
          range: [x2Min, x2Max],
          showspikes: false
        },
        zaxis: {
          title: "σ(wx+b)",
          range: [0, 1],
          showspikes: false
        },
        aspectmode: "manual",
        aspectratio: { x: 1, y: 1, z: 0.7 },
        camera: {
          eye: { x: 1.1, y: -0.8, z: 0.5 }
        }
      }
    },
    { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true }
  );

  if (invalid) {
    const note = document.createElement("div");
    note.textContent = "No decision boundary (w1 = w2 = 0)";
    note.style.cssText = `
      position: absolute;
      top: 18px;
      left: 18px;
      background: white;
      border: 1px solid black;
      padding: 8px 10px;
      font-size: 13px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      z-index: 10;
    `;

    const wrapper3d = document.createElement("div");
    wrapper3d.style.cssText = "position: relative; width: 420px; height: 420px;";
    plot3dDiv.style.width = "100%";
    plot3dDiv.style.height = "100%";
    wrapper3d.appendChild(plot3dDiv);
    wrapper3d.appendChild(note);
    return wrapper3d;
  }

  const wrapper3d = document.createElement("div");
  wrapper3d.style.cssText = "display:flex; justify-content:center; width:100%;";
  wrapper3d.appendChild(plot3dDiv);
  return wrapper3d;
}
```
